app.title: Inventory Edge Shell
app.subtitle: Offline-first frontline capture
capture.testDescription: Records a local shell test event before central sync.
bootstrap.firstSyncBody: Connect this device once before offline capture is available.
errors.INVALID_EVENT_ENVELOPE: The captured event format is invalid. Contact support.
errors.UNTAGGED_TRANSACTION: The event is missing required business tags.
errors.STREAM_CONFLICT: This event conflicts with the latest central state.
errors.CALIBRATION_LOCKOUT: The referenced instrument is locked by calibration status.
errors.LOCATION_ACCESS_DENIED: This device is not authorized for that site.
